title: OpenSea CMO Predicts Tokenized Collectibles Will Drive Next NFT Boom
summary: OpenSea's CMO Adam Hollander believes AI advancements will make it easier to tokenize real-world items like Pokémon cards, Rolexes, and tickets. This could bring more mainstream attention to NFTs by making them more accessible and practical.
body:
OpenSea's Chief Marketing Officer, Adam Hollander, has shared his vision for the future of NFTs, suggesting that the next big wave will be driven by tokenized versions of everyday collectibles and high-value items. According to Hollander, advancements in AI are making it simpler for people to create and manage these tokenized assets, which could include everything from Pokémon cards to Rolexes and event tickets.

Hollander highlighted that the ease of creating and trading these tokenized assets will be a key factor in their adoption. He mentioned that AI tools will help streamline the process, making it more accessible to a broader audience. This could lead to a surge in the market for tokenized collectibles, as people look to verify authenticity and ownership of high-value items.

For everyday users, this could mean a more practical and mainstream use of NFTs. Instead of focusing solely on digital art, NFTs could become a way to verify and trade real-world items, adding a layer of security and transparency. This could also attract new users to the crypto space who are interested in collectibles and high-value items.

As AI continues to evolve, we can expect to see more innovative uses of NFTs in the real world. For those interested in this space, keeping an eye on developments from OpenSea and other major NFT platforms will be crucial. The next wave of NFTs could be just around the corner, and it might look very different from what we've seen before.
twitterThread: Pokémon cards, Rolexes, and concert tickets could be the next big thing in NFTs, thanks to AI advancements. OpenSea's CMO shares his vision.
OpenSea's Adam Hollander says AI will make it easier to tokenize real-world items, bringing NFTs to a mainstream audience. Think verified collectibles and secure trading.

If you're into collectibles, keep an eye on how AI and NFTs intersect. The next wave could be more practical than you think. Read more → https://www.cryptocatalyst.news/articles/2026-05-15-opensea-cmo-predicts-tokenized-collectibles-will-drive-next-nft-boom
standaloneTweet: Your Pokémon cards and Rolexes could soon be NFTs, thanks to AI. OpenSea's CMO says tokenized collectibles are the next big thing in the NFT world.
